articles.title: What Are E22, E25, E27 And E30 Fuels That Centre Just Exempted From Excise duty
articles.description: The centre zeroed out on central excise duty, special additional excise duty, Road and Infrastructure Cess, and Agriculture Infrastructure and Development Cess on petrol blended with 22%, 25%, 27%, and 30% ethanol, respectively.

articles.title: Sensex, Nifty opening: Will stock market fall today amid fresh escalation in Middle East?
articles.description: Fresh US strikes on Iran and hotter US inflation readings weighed on risk sentiment ahead of Thursday's trade. Higher oil prices and continued FPI outflows have added to concerns for Indian equities.

articles.title: Why are oil prices up now and will Brent futures and US WTI crude prices continue to rise or decline again? Oil market reacts to US-Iran escalation and Strait of Hormuz closure
articles.description: Why are oil prices up now and will Brent futures and US WTI crude prices continue to rise or decline again? Oil markets moved higher after tensions between the United States and Iran increased. Traders reacted to reports about the Strait of Hormuz closure, military action, lower crude inventories, and reduced oil output. Brent futures and US WTI crude prices climbed as supply concerns returned to the market and investors assessed future risks.

articles.title: Maharashtra unlikely to cut VAT on petrol, diesel despite Centre’s appeal: Report
articles.description: State finance officials said that petrol and diesel VAT brings Maharashtra over Rs 65,000 crore, making a tax cut difficult amid a projected FY27 revenue deficit.

articles.title: Govt exempts 22% to 30% ethanol blended petrol from central excise duty
articles.description: Govt exempts 22% to 30% ethanol blended petrol from central excise duty

articles.title: Higher ethanol blended petrol between 22-30% exempted from central excise duty
articles.description: Government exempts central excise duty on petrol blended with 22-30% ethanol to promote biofuel use and cleaner transportation.

articles.title: Govt exempts 22% to 30% ethanol blended petrol from central excise duty
articles.description: The government has extended central excise duty exemptions to petrol blended with 22 per cent, 25 per cent, 27 per cent and 30 per cent ethanol. There will be a nil excise duty rate for fuel blends that conform to BIS standards.

articles.title: US launches new strikes on Iran, which fires back at Gulf states
articles.description: The United States launched a second round of airstrikes on Iran and Iran has fired back at Gulf States after President Donald Trump warned that Tehran would “pay the price” for stalled negotiations. The new U.S. assault across multiple Iranian cities came Thursday as efforts to negotiate an end the war again appeared stuck, with Iran insisting it would maintain its chokehold on the Strait of Hormuz, which has disrupted global energy supplies and sent oil prices higher. Iran retaliated with strikes targeting Bahrain and Kuwait, both of which host U.S. troops, and Kuwait closed its airspace in response.

articles.title: US-Iran War Key Developments: US Fires Precision Munitions, Hormuz Closed, Oil Prices Jump, Asian Stocks Fall
articles.description: Trump warned Iran that bombing would pause based on a request from Iranian leaders but would resume the following day if Tehran failed to sign a deal.

articles.title: Stocks drop, oil rises as Iran and rate worries dog traders
articles.description: Stocks fell while oil prices rose amid Iran tensions and interest rate hike concerns, impacting global markets.
